name: ♡₊˚ ・₊✧ || JUYEON
description:
“Now he’s gone and he’s callin’ me a bitch again”

- bad at love, Halsey

Juyeon wasn’t sure if he even liked you anymore. Yeah you’re his his partner but you’re so goddamn annoying.

Now that you came back to visit him in your hometown, he’s on edge. Not knowing how much of your constant nagging he could take.
